{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201807533D94F12856343FC56F19"}"},"total":17758},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7060480205344736031","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"书荒一定要看，是无限流题材里写的比较好的一本。主角性格非常贴我喜好！陆哥好帅！终于不是无脑傻白甜男主依靠金手指躺着过关了，老母亲落泪。
副本内容逻辑紧密，伏笔埋了很多，有些副本类型比较常见，但后期有很多新颖题材，比如说机器人和无限循环，这一点也很戳我。因为无限流看多了大家套路其实都差不多，容易疲劳，有新东西自然很棒。
感情线不突兀，过渡很自然，很甜。
总的来说，是无限流里面比较出众的一本，推荐一看。
以上仅个人评价。","text_exts":[{"e":112,"s":109,"text":"机器人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9C%BA%E5%99%A8%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317740012743FC56F19%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227060480205344736031%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226984313898778233887%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9C%BA%E5%99%A8%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1643896152,"group_id":"6984313898778233887","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"同我啜泣 共我悲鸣","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9BbxfhHacTqJT+ei375RLKwPnaxJ4XBV7oSJxtLswhl","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cfc17926e9494848bc8221855bf33f86~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776536076&x-signature=l0GGnx9cEzcQM6yuNvMsnyADlkU%3D","user_id":"2000749692721492","user_name":"且辽"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2000749692721492","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1747700761,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6984313898778233887","book_info":{"abstract":"【1v1双强+无限流+沙雕+病娇】
有的人才进逃生游戏就自带bug，比如陆无。

":{"comment_id":"7100060450163491617","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"双男主
陆无武力、智商在线。有底线的善良（更确切地说是有人性），暴力起来会暴露疯批属性。
九岚，前期的副本boss（就两个副本是没有记忆的）后期的小醋坛子。偏执宠妻什么的太香了。
两人疑似一个为100年前病死的超级人工智能发明者，一个是只遵从发明者的人工智能。
两人因不知名原因进入游戏，一人化身玩家，一人化身隐藏boss。
由技能相识，因吻定情。
